title: Communicate And Engage Using NLP
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable workplace effectiveness workshop for strengthening communicate and engage using NLP.
whyThisMatters: Communicate And Engage Using NLP helps employees and supervisors strengthen communicate and engage using NLP through clearer communication, practical tools, and better everyday work habits. Participants explore Verbal communication (10.45 am to 1.00 pm), NLP Communication Model and how it affects us, and Understanding effective communication so the learning can be translated into immediate action at work.
builtFor: Employees who need stronger communication or personal effectiveness habits
walkAwayWith: Communicate and organize work with more clarity and confidence.
Apply practical tools to improve decisions, writing, planning, or collaboration.
Recognize habits that affect personal and team performance.
Build action steps for better day-to-day effectiveness.

modules.title: NLP Communication Model and how it affects us

methodologyCaption: The workshop combines short inputs, practical exercises, and reflection so participants can translate the topic into everyday work habits.
